parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
    FROM 
        workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw"
    WHERE 
        "status" = '1 - ExtractedWithUniqueID'
        AND NULLIF(TRIM("normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"), '') IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS Duplicate_group_count,
    SUM(cnt) AS Duplicate_record_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) as cnt
    FROM 
        workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw"
    WHERE 
        "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl" IN (SELECT "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl" FROM base)
    GROUP BY 
        "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
) sub;

SELECT 
    id, 
    "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl", 
    status, 
    "createdAt"
FROM 
    workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw"
WHERE 
    "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl" IN (
        SELECT "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
        FROM workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw"
        WHERE "status" = '1 - ExtractedWithUniqueID'
        GROUP BY "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
ORDER BY 
    "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl", 
    "createdAt" ASC;

-- Step 1 - Identify primary records per LinkedIn URL
WITH primary_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON ("normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl")
        id AS primary_id,
        "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl"
    FROM workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw"
    WHERE "status" = 'Duplicate Merger Pending'
       AND COALESCE("normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl", '') <> ''
    ORDER BY "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl", "createdAt" ASC
)

-- Step 2 - Mark primary records as Duplicate Merged (status 5)
UPDATE workspace_dqaf41n5sd58vkd3u2ns7cwgs."_peopleraw" p
SET 
    "status" = 'Duplicate Merged',
    "updatedAt" = NOW()
WHERE id IN (SELECT primary_id FROM primary_records)
RETURNING id, "normalizedLinkedinUrlPrimaryLinkUrl", "status";

parameters.content: Check Duplicates with Details. Grabs the individual IDs, URLs, and creation dates for all conflicting records so you can verify them.
Once Verified, Run Update. Uses a Common Table Expression (CTE) to pick the oldest (DISTINCT ON / ORDER BY createdAt ASC) record as your master "primary" row and flags it as Duplicate Merged.
Returns a quick calculation showing the absolute count of rows remaining with the status code 4 - DuplicateMergerPending.
